simpsonize.base: Transform the person in the provided image into a 2D cartoon character from The Simpsons.
simpsonize.style: Keep their distinct facial features, hair color, and clothing style, but apply the classic yellow skin tone, large circular eyes, and simple bold outlines characteristic of The Simpsons animation style.
simpsonize.quality: High quality, flat colors, completely solid background, vector art style, official show style.
simpsonize.dynamicTemplate: {{base}} {{style}} Adicionalmente, asegúrate de mantener estos detalles clave de la foto original: {{userContext}}. {{quality}}
